settings.soundCreateHint: Play a sound when a request is added: you hear it when you click; everyone (including the player added) hears it when another client adds to the queue.
settings.soundOnPromptActivateHint: Play a sound when the epic prompt is shown (GM callout)
settings.promptShowSoundHint: Path to the file for the sound when the epic prompt is shown (GM callout)
settings.soundActivateHint: Play a sound when the GM calls someone out (queue click or targeted callout) or when activateRequest runs (macro/socket).
settings.reqClickSoundHint: Path to the file for the sound when activating a request
settings.firstRequestSoundHint: Audio file to play for the first (common) request.
settings.secondRequestSoundHint: Audio file to play for the second (important) request.
settings.thirdRequestSoundHint: Audio file to play for the third (urgent) request.
settings.queueAllPlayersOnlyHint: When enabled, “add all to queue” only includes users with the Player role. When disabled, every connected user (including GMs and Assistants) is included. Order is randomized each time.

buttons.queueTransferTooltip: Change the position of the requests window to Free
buttons.queueAllMenuTooltip: Add all connected users to the queue (random order)
buttons.pickPlayerCalloutTooltip: Send a player callout or roll prompt

pickPlayerCallout.needDieAndCount: Choose how many dice and a die type.
pickPlayerCallout.rollFailed: Could not roll dice. Check the formula or your system.
